cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this question. The question is asking why the text uses a lot of figures. The options are A, B, C, or D. First, I need to understand the text. The passage is about the growth of credit card usage in China and the implications of that growth. The author mentions numbers like "about 30 percent of Chinese urban households now own at least one credit card", "an average of 40 percent per year between 2004 and 2009", "90 percent of non-credit card users were unaware...", "72 percent...were never late on their payments", and so on. The question is asking what the purpose of including these figures is. Let's look at the options again: A) record the valuable data B) provide concrete evidence C) introduce a research method D) give a detailed description Option A: "record the valuable data" – This might be a possible answer because the text is presenting data.
